skills.name: agent-team-orchestration
skills.description: Orchestrate multi-agent teams with defined roles, task lifecycles, handoff protocols, and review workflows. Use when: (1) Setting up a team of 2+ agents with different specializations, (2) Defining task routing and lifecycle (inbox → spec → build → review → done), (3) Creating handoff protocols between agents, (4) Establishing review and quality gates, (5) Managing async communication and artifact sharing between agents.

skills.name: github-workspace-editor
skills.description: Leest en wijzigt bestanden in deze GitHub-workspace. Kan prompts, configs en scripts aanpassen. Genereert commit-voorstellen voor review door gebruiker.

skills.name: openclaw-workspace-pro
skills.description: Production-ready workspace setup for OpenClaw agents. Implements artifact workflows, secrets management, memory compaction, and long-running agent patterns based on OpenAI's Shell + Skills best practices. One-command installation transforms your workspace into a production-ready environment.

skills.name: promo-content-writer
skills.description: Genereert platform-specifieke promo-content: titels, hooks, beschrijvingen, hashtags en CTA's voor TikTok, Reels, Shorts en andere social media.

skills.name: telemetry-logger
skills.description: Logt alle workflow-events, agent-interacties en outputs voor monitoring, debugging en self-improvement. Onderhoudt IMPROVEMENTS.md voor optimalisatie-ideeën.

skills.name: video-ffmpeg-pipeline
skills.description: Wrapper rond de bestaande video-rendering pipeline (TTS + FFmpeg). Zet JSON-scripts om naar MP4-video's met voiceover, B-roll en text overlays.

skills.name: video-sora2-generator
skills.description: Genereert video's via OpenAI Sora 2 API (text-to-video of image-to-video). Optimaliseert prompts voor realistische scenes, camera control en audio sync.

skills.name: workspace-manager
skills.description: Workspace setup and organization assistant for ClawPad users. Triggers on: (1) First-time setup - "just set up ClawPad", "new workspace", "help me organize" (2) Project creation - "new project", "create folder structure" (3) Workspace maintenance - "reorganize", "clean up workspace", "where should I put" (4) Document creation - "create a plan", "new tracking doc", "start a runbook"

skills.name: workspace-standard
skills.description: Set up and maintain a structured OpenClaw workspace with project boundaries, role-based file taxonomy, and memory budgets. Use when: (1) bootstrapping a new workspace, (2) migrating from a flat docs/ structure, (3) adding a new project, (4) unsure where to write something, (5) running workspace maintenance, (6) auditing workspace health. Provides the directory layout, ROLE front-matter spec, MEMORY.md budget rules, and maintenance procedures.

skills.name: manager-school
skills.description: Orchestrator voor school/onderzoekstaken met workflow opdracht → research → writing → review → eindversie.

skills.name: research-school
skills.description: Onderzoeksagent voor bronverzameling, betrouwbaarheidsscore en researchrapporten voor schooltaken.

skills.name: writer-school
skills.description: Schrijver die research omzet naar Nederlandse rapporten/werkstukken/essays met bronvermelding.

skills.name: review-school
skills.description: Reviewer die drafts controleert op structuur, broncorrectheid, taal en kwaliteitscriteria.

skills.name: manager-email
skills.description: Orchestrator voor e-mailcommunicatie met workflow compose → approval → send en strikte approval-gate.

skills.name: composer-email
skills.description: Schrijft professionele e-maildrafts op basis van onderwerp, ontvanger en manager-context met templates.

skills.name: sender-email
skills.description: Verzendt goedgekeurde e-maildrafts met OAuth2, rate limiting en logging (warning: approval required).

skills.name: manager-discovery
skills.description: Orchestrator voor autonome business discovery met self-directed research loops

skills.name: explorer
skills.description: Autonome onderzoeker die lead chains 3-5 levels diep volgt voor business opportunities

skills.name: validator
skills.description: Valideert gevonden opportunities op markt, concurrentie, haalbaarheid en revenue model

skills.name: synthesizer
skills.description: Schrijft Codex-ready business idea rapporten van gevalideerde opportunities
